name: haskell-plugin
description: Haskell development skills and hooks for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Haskell skills and HLint checks for Codex
interface.longDescription: Haskell Plugin gives Codex reusable guidance for idiomatic Haskell, Servant APIs and clients, Effectful, Relude, build/test workflows, code review, and optional HLint checks after Haskell edits.
